title: CBN MPC Retains Interest Rate at 11.5%
description: The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) on Monday resolved to leave all monetary policy parameters unchanged in a bid to support the growth and recovery of the economy. The apex bank,  after its Monetary Po
html:
The Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) on Monday resolved to leave all monetary policy parameters unchanged in a bid to support the growth and recovery of the economy.

The apex bank,  after its Monetary Policy Committee (MPC) meeting,  the second in 2022, resolved to retain the Monetary Policy Rate (MPR), otherwise known as the interest rate, at 11.5 per cent with the asymmetric corridor of +100/-700 basis points around the MPR.

The MPR is the rate at which the CBN lends to commercial banks and often determines the cost of borrowing in the economy. The MPC also voted to maintain the Cash Reserve Ratio (CRR) at 27.5 per cent as well as the Liquidity Ratio at 30 per cent.
